description: MetaMap provides identity verification and onboarding tools, including document, biometric, government, watchlist, email, phone, and related checks. Its product helps businesses verify users and review verification results through configurable workflows and SDKs.
summary: MetaMap exposes one authenticated HTTP API at https://api.prod.metamap.com, using client credentials to mint a short-lived JWT bearer token; public GraphQL, MCP, and CLI surfaces were not found.
